heading: Omitted

notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to adoption of a tribal constitution and bylaws and election of tribal officials, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 103–434, title II, § 207108 Stat. 4535Oct. 31, 1994
